_doc: Kitchen-sink fixture for the full claim flow. Adds three more expenditures (with different vendors / sources) to the Vantage-7 claim, runs an Agent-B-style activity-register draft pass (ACTIVITY_REGISTER_DRAFTED) and an Agent-C narrative draft pass (NARRATIVE_DRAFTED + persisted narrative_draft + narrative_segment rows). Closes with an apportionment of one expenditure across both activities so the apportionment-mapping pipeline is exercised end-to-end.

activity_register_proposal.summary: Agent B's draft register proposes the existing CORE + SUPPORTING activities (proposed_from chain walk) and flags no new activities to add. Confidence is high because the evidence stream concentrates around a single furnace program with one external-lab contractor.

proposed_activities.title: Vantage-7 phase-stability program
proposed_activities.rationale: Twelve furnace runs (N1–N12), B-substituted γ' alloy, contemporaneous documentation across hypothesis / observation / time-log / voice-note / lab-book / XRD evidence.

proposed_activities.title: Heat-flow and metrology support
proposed_activities.rationale: Bluescope external-lab testing, CSIRO test suite, AWS compute for heat-flow modelling, and Agilent metrology services that supported the core activity without performing it.

narrative_draft.summary: Agent C's narrative draft for the CORE activity, structured under the four standard headings. Cites the contemporaneous evidence events captured in cases 01–07 + 09; the per-segment citation events line up to the seeded event IDs.

sections.segments_summary: One claim segment citing the case-01 hypothesis text event + case-04 whiteboard photo + case-06 narrative draft (Hypothesis section).
One prose segment + one claim segment citing case-06 (Technical uncertainty section) + case-07 quench-rate sensitivity sheet.
Three prose segments + two claim segments across case-02 observation, case-05 lab-book PDF, case-09 voice transcript, and case-07 mass-loss audit.
One prose + one claim segment citing case-02 + case-05 + case-09 (the N12-INTACT result) and the case-06 narrative-draft Outcome section.
